query:
-- Check how many have producto
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN producto IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
    WHEN UPPER(TRIM(producto)) IN ('REMOVIDA', 'APAGADO', 'NO DISPLAY') THEN 'Excluded'
    ELSE 'Valid Product'
  END as producto_status,
  activa,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM paradas
GROUP BY producto_status, activa
ORDER BY producto_status, activa;

-- Show some examples of paradas with valid producto
SELECT cobertizo_id, producto, activa 
FROM paradas 
WHERE producto IS NOT NULL 
  AND UPPER(TRIM(producto)) NOT IN ('REMOVIDA', 'APAGADO', 'NO DISPLAY', '')
LIMIT 10;
